title: APTITUDE content manifest
description: Frozen contract between the aptitude-course content repo (which generates this manifest from per-file YAML frontmatter) and the adepthood backend (which vendors and reads it). Changing this schema post-merge requires a schema_version bump and a note in docs/adr/0001-git-content-pipeline.md (issue #389). schema_version 1.1.0 adds the optional, additive 'stage_intros[]' tier (per-stage course introductions); a 1.0.0 manifest with no 'stage_intros' stays valid.

schema_version.description: Semver of this contract. Readers must reject manifests with a different major version.

site_resources.description: Free site resources, mirroring the legacy SITE_RESOURCES table.

stage_intros.description: Optional per-stage course introductions (added in schema_version 1.1.0). Ungated and not seeded; the reader serves them straight from the manifest. Omitting this key keeps a 1.0.0 manifest valid.

id.description: Stable identifier, e.g. 'beige-1'. Never reused or renumbered.

stage.description: Curriculum stage 1..10 — identical numbering in both repos (see the ADR's stage-numbering reconciliation).

release_day.description: Days after the stage start when this item drips open (0 = immediately).

order.description: Display order within the stage (ascending). Distinct from 'chapter': 'order' may interleave essays/prompts/videos between chapters; ties are resolved by 'chapter' then 'id'.

path.description: Markdown path relative to the content repo root, e.g. 'markdown/01-beige/01-survival.md'.

description.description: Human-readable blurb. Deliberately allowed to be empty (unlike title/slug) — a resource may not need one.

stage.description: Curriculum stage 1..10 this introduction belongs to (same numbering as chapters).

id.description: Stable identifier, unique repo-wide, e.g. 'beige-intro'. Never reused or renumbered.

path.description: Markdown path relative to the content repo root, e.g. 'markdown/01-beige/00-introduction.md'.
